entities.name: Deihel
entities.raw_quote: proferri non debent, que sunt hec: (4) Deihel. Dehel. Depymo. Dein. Hel.

entities.name: Michael
entities.raw_quote: Michael, i.e. the medicine of God

entities.name: Cherubim
entities.raw_quote: Cherubim: ielomynctos. gadabany. zedabanay. gederanay. saramany. lomtety. loctosy. gerohanathon. zahamany. lomyht. gedanabasy. setemanay. seremanay. henlothant. helomyht. henboramyt. samanazay. gedebaudi.

entities.name: Jesus Christ
entities.raw_quote: you, O Jesus Christ, through all your saints and glorious [arch]angels

entities.name: Prayer XXIV
entities.raw_quote: XXIV. Prayer. O God, the most high, invisible God.

entities.name: Prayer XXVI

attributes.subject: Jesus, son of the incomprehensible God

entities.raw_quote: XXVI. Prayer. Iesu, Dei filius incomprehensibilis, hancor. hanacor. hanylos.

entities.name: Prayer XXVII
entities.raw_quote: XXVII. Prayer. Eleminator. candones. helos. helee. resphaga.

entities.name: Prayer XXX
entities.raw_quote: XXX. Prayer. Memoria irreprehensibilis, sapiencia incontradicibilis et incommutabilis Deus, angelus eterni consilii

entities.name: Holy Spirit
entities.raw_quote: Deus Pater, Deus Fili, Deus Spiritus sancte

summary: This chunk contains a series of liturgical prayers (XXIV through XLI) containing various divine names, angelic hierarchies (Seraphim, Cherubim), and lists of ineffable names. The text focuses on petitions for spiritual vision, purification, and the strengthening of memory and intellect through the power of God and His angels.
key_passages: O God, the most high, invisible God. Theos. Patir. behemnos. lehernnyos. behenny.
Michael, i.e. the medicine of God, Raphael, the Strength of enough, Gabriel, burning
I beseech you, O my Lord: illuminate and clarify my soul and conscience with the brilliance of your light
The truth, the light, the way, and the life of all creatures, O just God, vivify me
Deus omnipotens... in cuius manu omnia sunt munda et pura
